product_overview: A responsive personal portfolio website for a full-stack developer that showcases interactive 3D visuals and provides a contact form for visitors to send messages. The app serves as a professional online presence with a dynamic, engaging landing experience.
core_goals: Showcase an interactive developer portfolio landing experience
Let visitors explore a 3D CyberDeck model with hover labels and rotation
Allow visitors to send a message through the contact form

features.name: 3D Interaction
features.description: An interactive 3D CyberDeck experience on the main portfolio page that users can inspect visually and manipulate.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag to rotate the 3D model -> Hover over nodes to see labels -> Observe the interactive CyberDeck display

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: A contact section that lets visitors submit their name, email, and message from the portfolio page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in message -> Submit the contact form -> See the message send confirmation
Navigate to / -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Leave the message incomplete -> Submit the contact form -> See form validation feedback

features.name: 3D Interaction
user_interactions: Hover over nodes to see labels

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Send messages via the contact section
